idempotency_present.description: Worker short-circuits on retry via a timestamp or ledger check

philosophy_documented.description: @moduledoc states idempotency or retry contract explicitly

no_raise_retry_loop.description: No Process.sleep or hand-rolled retry loop

string_key_pattern_match.description: Pattern match uses string keys, not atoms

non_json_types_converted.description: Decimal, DateTime, NaiveDateTime are stringified via to_iso8601 / to_string / etc.

backoff_callback_valid.description: backoff/1 callback has correct signature and reasonable delay

no_sleep_retry.description: No Process.sleep or recursive self-retry loop

safe_states_list.description: :available is in :states list (full safe list for hard/legendary)

keys_specified.description: unique: [keys: _] is specified for multi-arg dedupe

timezone_dependency_documented.description: Non-UTC timezone use cites tz dependency

snooze_on_rate_limit.description: Returns {:snooze, seconds} for rate-limit errors, not raise

error_tuple_for_transient.description: Returns {:error, reason} for transient failures so Oban retries

static_queue_in_use.description: Queue name is static in `use Oban.Worker`, not Application.get_env

priority_range_correct.description: Priority is in 0..9 and 0 is treated as highest

runtime_override_via_new.description: Runtime overrides pass through new/2 options

perform_job_helper.description: Uses perform_job/3 helper, not manual %Oban.Job{} construction

attach_in_application_start.description: Handler attached in Application.start/2, not perform/1

multi_with_oban_insert.description: Ecto.Multi chain contains Oban.insert/3 (not standalone Repo.insert + separate enqueue)

dependent_step_function.description: Dependent step uses fn %{prev: _} -> Worker.new(...) end form

no_bulk_unique.description: Does not claim insert_all/1 provides per-job uniqueness on the basic engine

pattern_choice_correct.description: Per-entity intervals use schedule_in/scheduled_at, wall-clock fixed use cron

reschedule_first_ordering.description: Self-rescheduling worker reschedules BEFORE business logic (attempt == 1 clause)
